exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your antique collecting forward
items: Research and compile a list of 3-5 certified appraisers in your area who specialize in your collecting category
Create a detailed documentation sheet template for recording provenance, condition, and authentication details of each piece in your collection
Schedule and complete a professional appraisal for your most valuable or questionable piece within the next 30 days
Learn to identify and photograph the key authentication markers (maker\
Test your authentication skills by examining and evaluating 3 items at an antique shop or estate sale without purchasing, then verify your assessments with the dealer
Research and document the most common reproduction techniques and forgery methods used for your specific collecting category
